title: Help
subtitle: Tips on how to use the app
intro: Below are short tips on how to use the app's main screens.

home.title: Home
home.content:
The Overview card shows your net worth, calculated from all account, client and staff balances.
Your accounts (cash, bank, credit card) are listed here; tap one to see its details and transactions.
Use the + button at the bottom right to quickly add income, expense, a transfer or a client/staff transaction.
With "Enter Daily Revenue" you can record end-of-day account entries in bulk from a single screen.

cariler.title: Contacts (Customers & Suppliers)
cariler.content:
Add your customers and suppliers from the Contacts tab; a debit/credit balance is calculated automatically for each.
From a contact's detail you can add sale, purchase, payment and collection transactions.
Use the chart icon at the top right for that contact's report, and the share icon for its statement.
To share a contact with another business, use the share code on the contact card.

personel.title: Staff
personel.content:
Add your employees from the Staff tab; a balance is tracked for each.
You can record salary/expense accruals, payments, bonuses and advances.
Use the bulk salary or bulk payment screen to process several staff at once.
By entering leave entitlements and leave usage you can track each employee's remaining leave.

urunler.title: Products & Stock
urunler.content:
Manage your products and stock quantities from the Products tab.
Update quantity with stock in/out; use adjustment to set stock directly to a desired value.
Use the bulk in/out screen to process many products at once.
If you link a transaction to a contact, both stock and the contact balance are updated together.

islemler.title: Transactions
islemler.content:
When adding a transaction, choose its type: income, expense, transfer between accounts, or a client/staff transaction.
By adding products to a transaction you can create the stock movement at the same time.
Create a scheduled transaction and get a reminder when it is due.
You can attach a receipt/invoice photo, and search and filter from the All Transactions screen.

raporlar.title: Reports
raporlar.content:
From Reports, access income-expense, category, account-based and net worth trend reports.
Use the period selector at the top to choose yearly, monthly, weekly, daily or a custom date range.
You can export reports and statements as Excel and PDF and share them.

mutabakat.title: Reconciliation
mutabakat.content:
With Reconciliation you can compare your records for a contact against the Excel/CSV statement they send you.
The app detects missing or extra entries; you can add the missing ones with a single tap.

paylasim.title: Sharing & Multi-User
paylasim.content:
To share your business with teammates, create an invite code and assign a manager, operator or custom role.
Each role has different permissions; a user cannot see disabled modules.
You can share a specific contact with another business; the other side sees only that contact.
You can remove sharing at any time.

import.title: Import & Export
import.content:
Use Import Data in the More menu to bulk-import transactions from an Excel file.
You can export lists, reports and statements as Excel (.xlsx) and PDF.
Exported files are saved to your device; sharing is entirely your choice.

tips.title: Handy Tips
tips.content:
Swipe list items left or right to quickly edit or delete them.
Customize your income/expense categories from the Categories screen.
Instead of deleting an account, contact or staff you no longer use, archive it; your past reports are preserved.
You can change your currency and language preferences from the More menu.
